title: Persons subject to interdiction
doc_html:
Art. 362. Persons subject to interdiction

            Persons subject to interdiction, in accordance with the provisions of Title IX of this Book, remain subject to interdiction as provided in Articles 389 through 399 and any other applicable laws.

            Acts 1966, No. 496, §2; Acts 2024, No. 123, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 362.  Persons subject to interdiction
Persons subject to interdiction, in accordance with the provisions of Title IX  of this
Book, remain subject to interdiction as provided in Articles 389  through 399 and  any other
applicable laws.
Acts 1966, No. 496, §2; Acts 2024, No. 123, §1.
